Description: Zaanse Schans is a neighborhood in Zaandam, North Holland, famous for its historic windmills and wooden houses which were moved there for preservation.I choose it because it offers a unique, living snapshot of 17th and 18th-century Dutch life.
Atlantis Paradise Island is an ocean-themed mega-resort on Paradise Island, Bahamas. I choose it because it has luxury accommodation and beautiful scenary an water entertainment
angled view of the exterior of the Colosseum, one of the most famous and recognizable ancient structures in the world. I chose it because it has an interesting history of ancient times
Stonehenge is a prehistoric megalithic structure on Salisbury Plain in Wiltshire, England, two miles (3 km) west of Amesbury. I choose it because it has a mysterious pass and is considered an engima

Lauterbrunnen is a glacial valley in the Bernese Alps known for its vertical cliffs, mountainous meadows, and numerous waterfalls I would visit To experience the natural beauty of the valley, waterfalls, and mountain scenery.

Zhangjiajie National Forest Park is defined by vertical sandstone pillars rising through dense mist, creating a landscape that appears almost otherworldly. I chose this place for its distinctive geology.

Daisetsuzan National Park is a huge area of mountains, volcanoes, and open wild land in the middle of Hokkaido. I would choose this place because it gives me quiet space, fresh air, and a chance to see strong natural landscapes up close.

Neuschwanstein Castle is a big castle  in Bavaria, with towers that look like they came from a fantasy world. I would choose this place because it feels like stepping into an adventure, with dramatic views and a castle that looks built for epic stories.

Oia in Santorini is famous for its whitewashed houses, blue-domed churches, and cliffside views of the Aegean Sea. I choose it because the architecture and landscape together create a visually iconic coastal scene.
Iguazu Falls is a scenic waterfall in a lush setting; I choose to visit for its natural beauty, serenity, and opportunities for hiking and photography.
